zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston於大約1407年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，他的父親John Broughton43歲，母親Mary Peyvre26歲。他於1434年與Elizabeth Stoneham結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年7月23日在英國貝德福爾托丁頓享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston于大约1407年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，他的父亲John Broughton43岁，母亲Mary Peyvre26岁。他于1434年与Elizabeth Stoneham结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年7月23日在英国貝德福爾托丁頓享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston was born about 1407, in Preston, Lancashire, England, his father, John Broughton, was 43 and his mother, Mary Peyvre, was 26. He married Elizabeth Stoneham in 1434. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 23 July 1489, in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston est né environ 1407, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Broughton, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mary Peyvre, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stoneham en 1434. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1489, à Toddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston um 1407 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Broughton 43 und seine Mutter Mary Peyvre 26. Er hat 1434 Elizabeth Stoneham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1489 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Toddington, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston è nato il circa 1407 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Broughton, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mary Peyvre, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stoneham nel 1434. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 luglio 1489, nel Toddington, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Broughton III, of Prestonが約1407年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで生まれた時，父John Broughtonは43歳，母Mary Peyvreは26歳であった。1434年にElizabeth Stonehamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年7月23日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトッドイントンで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston(이)가 대략 1407년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Broughton(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Peyvre(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1434년 Elizabeth Stoneham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 7월 23일 영국 베드퍼드실르 토딩턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston nasceu aproximadamente 1407, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Broughton, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mary Peyvre, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stoneham em 1434. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1489, em Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston родился около 1407 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Broughton было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Peyvre, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stoneham в 1434 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 июля 1489 г. в местности тоддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Broughton III, of Preston nació aproximadamente 1407, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Broughton, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mary Peyvre, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stoneham en 1434. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de julio de 1489, en Toddington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años.
